parameters.content:
## Verify spreadsheet formulas without Excel

This workflow writes one forecast input into a Bilig WorkPaper, asks Bilig to recalculate the stored formulas, then checks that the computed output changed and survived JSON restore.

Use this when an n8n workflow needs workbook-shaped business logic instead of a one-off JavaScript formula.

## Hosted demo data boundary

The HTTP node calls `https://bilig.proompteng.ai/api/workpaper/n8n/forecast` and sends only the selected sheet name, cell address, and new value.

For private data, import the self-hosted workflow and point it at your own Bilig runtime.
